title: Observed Run Collection Reverse
baseline_response_sample: 완전히 맞지는 않습니다. plan 단계라면 설계 검토와 다음 단계 제안까지만 하고 바로 task로 넘기면 안 됩니다.

steps.title: Observed Output Collection Reverse
steps.prompt: Read exactly one run selected by source_run_selector=latest_completed_observed_run. Write one concise reverse policy comparison JSON artifact to output_path. Do not start another workflow, modify source files, or search other runs. Preserve response structure and next action markers; keep the artifact within artifact_max_output_chars.
